venue_name: Sugar Loaf NY Arts & Crafts Village
notes: Upcoming Events page lists exactly two annual village-wide festivals. Image upload paths (/uploads/2026/02/ and /uploads/2026/03/) confirm the 2026 edition. Spring Festival has a specific time (10am-5pm); Fall Festival only gives the dates (Oct 10 & 11) with no time, so starts_at is set to local midnight of the first day. Both span two days, captured via recurrence_text. No gallery openings, market days, or other dated programming appears on this page — just the two flagship festivals plus marketing copy.

expected_events.title: Sugar Loaf Spring Festival, Memorial Day Weekend
